title: Global oil prices stabilise. Is this the calm before the storm?
section_path: Global oil prices stabilise. Is this the calm before the storm?
section_path_text: Global oil prices stabilise. Is this the calm before the storm?
summary:
Main
The global oil price rally has stalled. Rising onshore crude inventories and falling middle distillate cracks are posing downside risks on prices. By Serena Huang
Global oil prices are stabilising following weeks of persistent gains.
